Video.summary: Martha shares her love of houseplants. Learn about the popular houseplants and how to take care of them.
Video.title: Amazing Houseplants

Video.summary: Martha explores how best to care for succulents including watering, fertilizing, and repotting.
Video.title: The World of Succulents

Video.summary: Martha visits the annual Orchid Show at the New York Botanical Garden; acclaimed artist Lily Kwong.
Video.title: The Incredible World of Orchids

Video.summary: With over 200 chickens and 20 different breeds, Martha shares her tips for raising and caring for chickens.
Video.title: Hens and Chicks

Video.summary: Martha shows one of the joys of planting bulbs and tubers: having beautiful blooms from spring to winter.
Video.title: Color For All Seasons

Video.summary: Martha makes onions: French onion soup, pearl onions, fried onion rings, pickled onions.
Video.title: Onions

Video.summary: Omar Abou-Ismail joins Martha to learn about raw foods.
Video.title: The Art of Raw Food

Video.summary: Martha's step-by-step guide for a raised bed vegetable garden: building, preparing the soil, and planting.
Video.title: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden

Image.alt: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden
Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden
Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden

Video.summary: Join Martha while she plants a new garden with almost 200 roses.
Video.title: Everything's Coming Up Roses

Video.summary: Martha's woodland gardens, including her azalea grove, burst with the flowers of spring. Plus, bird watching.
Video.title: Azaleas, Hostas, and Wild Birds

Video.summary: Peek inside Martha's gardens past and present! Martha visits her former home, Turkey Hill.
Video.title: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Image.alt: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Video.summary: Martha roasts: roast rack of lamb, salt-roasted sea bass, saffron-roasted chicken wings.
Video.title: Roasting

Video.summary: Martha shows how to properly plant trees; Martha's new maze.
Video.title: Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees

Image.alt: Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees
Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees
Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees

Video.summary: Take a tour of Martha's Christmas tree farm; learn how to properly move an established tree.
Video.title: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers

Image.alt: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers
Everything You Need To Know About Conifers
Everything You Need To Know About Conifers

Video.summary: Martha harvests a year-round bounty. Then, how to collect, store, and sow seeds. Plus, Martha's green drink.
Video.title: Inside Martha's Vegetable Greenhouse

Video.summary: Martha prepares vegetables: steamed artichokes, braised leeks, fried okra, roasted garlic.
Video.title: Know Your Vegetables

Video.summary: Martha tours Breads Bakery with owner Gadi Paleg and learns about their award-winning baked goods.
Video.title: Baking Baguettes and Breads

Video.summary: Chef David Burke brings his modern classic dishes to Martha's kitchen, including a bacon "clothesline".
Video.title: Chef David Burke's Modern Classics

Video.summary: Martha visits Italian restaurant Il Buco Alimentari with Chef Justin Smillie.
Video.title: Rustic Italian Cuisine

Video.summary: Martha dines at award-winning Korean restaurant NARO and meets with Chef Nate Kuester.
Video.title: Exploring Korean Cuisine

Video.summary: Martha bakes yellow cake: Father's birthday cake, upside-down cake, strawberry cupcakes.
Video.title: Yellow Cake

Video.summary: Martha bakes pate sucree: lemon mousse tart, black bottom tart, chocolate caramel tart.
Video.title: Pate Sucree

Video.summary: Martha sautes Wiener schnitzel, chicken piccata, sole a la meuniere, calf's liver.
Video.title: Sauteing

Video.summary: Martha makes dumplings: Italian gnocchi and gnudi; her family recipe for Polish pierogi.
Video.title: Dumplings

Video.summary: Martha prepares grains: sauteed polenta, bulgur tabbouleh, breakfast quinoa, farro salad.
Video.title: Grains

Video.summary: Martha preserves: duck confit, tomato confit, gravlax (cured salmon appetizer).
Video.title: Preserving

Video.summary: Martha and chef Cesare Casella prepare legumes: seven bean salad, Boston baked beans.
Video.title: Legumes

Video.summary: Martha prepares shrimp: cocktail, scampi, traditional shrimp boil, simple grilled shrimp.
Video.title: Shrimp

Video.summary: Martha makes chicken: chicken paillard, chicken pot pie, spatchcocked chicken.
Video.title: Chicken

Video.summary: Martha prepares noodles: pad Thai (stir-fried), one-pan tomato pasta, pho, (noodle soup).
Video.title: Noodles

Video.summary: Martha's Derby Party: mint juleps and deviled eggs; racetrack centerpiece; Martha gets fitted by hat milliner.
Video.title: Martha Hosts a Derby Party

Video.summary: Homa Dashtaki, owner of the White Moustache yogurt company, shares her technique for making yogurt.
Video.title: All Things Yogurt

Video.summary: Martha and Salad Freak author Jess Dameck reveal perfect salad tips.
Video.title: Sensational Summer Salads

Video.summary: Martha bakes with cultured dairy: buttermilk, yogurt, and sour cream enhance baked goods.
Video.title: Cultured Dairy

Video.summary: Martha bakes with lemon: Italian cheese pizza, Meyer lemon coffee cake, souffle tart.
Video.title: Lemons

Video.summary: Martha bakes with ginger: ginger adds a peppery, sweet taste and subtle warmth to recipes.
Video.title: Ginger

Video.summary: Martha bakes with stone fruits: nectarine clafoutis, peach buckle, plum upside-down cake.
Video.title: Stone Fruit

Video.summary: Angel Food Cake with Berries, Planting Urns, Brooklyn Rose Garden
Video.title: Angel Food Cake, Brooklyn Garden

Video.summary: Puerto Rico Part 1: Tropical Fruits, Barrilitos Rum, Tropical Drinks
Video.title: Puerto Rico (Field Trip): Barrilitos Rum

Video.summary: Puerto Rico Part 2: Plantains, Pineapple Rum Good Thing, Bananas, Tropical Glace
Video.title: Puerto Rico Part 2 (Field Trip)

Video.summary: Gnocchi, Cotton Wreath, Disney Topiaries
Video.title: Gnocchi, Cotton Wreath, Disney Topiaries

Video.summary: Black Bass, Sea Urchins, Compound Butters
Video.title: Black Bass, Sea Urchins, Compound Butters

Black Bass, Sea Urchins, Compound Butters
Black Bass, Sea Urchins, Compound Butters

Video.summary: Summer Gardening: Propagating Tomatoes, Beekeeping, Planting Tomatoes
Video.title: Planting and Propagating Tomatoes, Beekeeping
